message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam monochrome true

actor "Sales Clerk" as SalesClerk
participant "OrderDeliveredUI" as UI <<Presentation>>
participant "OrderDeliveredController" as Controller <<Application>>
participant "OrderDeliveredService" as Service <<Service>>
participant "PersistenceContext" as Persistence <<Persistence>>
participant "RepositoryFactory\nfactory : RepositoryFactory" as Factory <<Factory>>
database "Repository\norderRepository : Repository" as Repository
participant "List<Order>\norderList" as OrderList <<Domain>>
participant "List<OrderDTO>\norderDTOList" as OrderDTOList <<DTO>>
participant "OrderMapper\n: OrderMapper" as Mapper <<DTO>>
participant "OrderDTO\norderDTO : OrderDTO" as OrderDTO <<DTO>>
participant "List<OrderDTO>\nselectedOrderDTOList" as SelectedOrderDTOList <<DTO>>
participant "Order\norder : Order" as Order <<Domain>>

note over SalesClerk: The Sales Clerk initializes\nthe process of updating the status of the order

SalesClerk -> UI: create
activate UI
UI -> Controller: create
activate Controller
Controller -> Service: repositories()
activate Service
Service -> Persistence: create
activate Persistence
Persistence --> Service: factory
deactivate Persistence
Service -> Factory: orderRepository()
activate Factory
Factory -> Repository: create
activate Repository
Repository --> Factory: orderRepository
deactivate Repository
deactivate Factory
Service --> Controller: orderRepository
deactivate Service
Controller -> Service: listAllDispatchedOrders()
activate Service
Service -> Repository: getAllDispatchedOrders()
activate Repository
Repository --> Service: orderList
deactivate Repository
Service -> OrderList: create
activate OrderList
OrderList --> Service: create
deactivate OrderList

rect rgb(200, 200, 255)
    note left: loop
    note right: {break}\ngetNext()
    Service -> OrderList: getNext()
    activate OrderList
    OrderList --> Service: order
    deactivate OrderList
    Service -> Mapper: toDTO(order)
    activate Mapper
    Mapper -> OrderDTO: create
    activate OrderDTO
    OrderDTO --> Mapper: orderDTO
    deactivate OrderDTO
    deactivate Mapper
    Service -> OrderDTOList: add(orderDTO)
    activate OrderDTOList
    OrderDTOList --> Service: 
    deactivate OrderDTOList
end rect

Service --> Controller: orderDTOList
deactivate Service
Controller --> UI: orderDTOList
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI

note over SalesClerk: The System presents a list of Orders to the\nSales Clerk whose Status are "Preparation"\nand asks the Sales Clerks to choose Orders\nwhose Status will be updated to "Delivered".

note over SalesClerk: The Sales Clerk selects the Orders whose\nStatus are to be updated.

SalesClerk -> UI: updateStatus(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate UI
UI -> Controller: updateStatusAndPersist(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate Controller
Controller -> Service: updateStatusAndPersist(selectedOrderDTOList)
activate Service

rect rgb(200, 200, 255)
    note left: loop
    note right: {break}\ngetNext()
    Service -> SelectedOrderDTOList: getNext()
    activate SelectedOrderDTOList
    SelectedOrderDTOList --> Service: orderDTO
    deactivate SelectedOrderDTOList
    Service -> Mapper: toOrder(orderDTO)
    activate Mapper
    Mapper --> Service: order
    deactivate Mapper
    Service -> Order: changeStatusToDelivered()
    activate Order
    Order --> Service: 
    deactivate Order
    Service -> Repository: update(order)
    activate Repository
    Repository --> Service: 
    deactivate Repository
end rect

Service --> Controller: 
deactivate Service
Controller --> UI: 
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI

note over SalesClerk: The System updates the Status of the selected Orders\nand informs the Sales Clerk of the operation success.

@enduml
```
